summary: Media Validation | Litmus Tool | Landing Page and Games List
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the Media Validation tile
Then the user should see the "Litmus" tool
And the user should see a table view of the days game contains "GamePK", "Matchup", "Venue", "Game Date", "Status"
And the user should see the date selector above the games component on the "Media Validation" page

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the Media Validation tile
